Hair services

L.A. Rae's is a full-service hair salon in Oakwood, IL. LeeAnn brings skill, passion, and a personal touch to every appointment — whether you're coming in for a trim or a full transformation.

Your stylist

Meet LeeAnn.

LeeAnn Martin is the owner and stylist behind L.A. Rae's in Oakwood, IL. She built this space from the ground up — a salon that feels personal, welcoming, and like a little escape from the everyday.

With a passion for hair and a love for her clients, LeeAnn takes pride in making sure every person who sits in her chair leaves feeling their best. She also curates Wheaton's Boutique right inside the salon, bringing together clothing and accessories she genuinely loves.

Whether you're a first-time client or a regular, you'll always feel at home here.

Licensed Stylist Salon Owner Boutique Curator Oakwood, IL
